description: Weapons data, interception rates, force posture.
facts: The drones used in the attack were confirmed as Shahed-136 variants with extended range capabilities.
Flight paths indicate launch sites deep within western Iran rather than proxy territories in Iraq or Syria.
Iron Dome interceptors (Tamir missiles) achieved an 85% success rate against the drone swarm.
Arrow 3 systems successfully engaged the 14 exoatmospheric ballistic missiles.
The repositioning of B-1B Lancers to Qatar (Al Udeid) aligns with US force projection doctrine to deter further regional escalation.
